revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月廿一]][[zh:十二月廿一]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 21|qq=December 21}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}} the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Chengping|en|Chengping|qid=Q11076356|lt=Shōhei (Japan)|1=Chengping}} 4 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|935|en|935|qid=Q24867|lt=935|1=935}} {{ill|January 28|en|January 28|qid=Q2285|lt=January 28|1=January 28}} ) - {{ill|Ki no Tsurayuki|en|Ki no Tsurayuki|qid=Q468288|lt=Ki no Tsurayuki|1=Ki no Tsurayuki}} completed his duty as governor of {{ill|Tosa Province|en|Tosa Province|qid=Q857330|lt=Tosa Province|1=Tosa Province}} and set out for the capital, beginning his writing of "{{ill|Tosa Nikki|en|Tosa Nikki|qid=Q844452|lt=Tosa Nikki|1=Tosa Nikki}} ." * {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|qid=Q1193951|lt=Kannin|1=Kannin}} 3 (Julian calendar {{ill|1020|en|1020|qid=Q19255|lt=1020|1=1020}} {{ill|January 18|en|January 18|qid=Q2265|lt=January 18|1=January 18}} ) - {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ’s eldest son, {{ill|Fujiwara no Yorimichi|en|Fujiwara no Yorimichi|qid=Q1370620|lt=Fujiwara no Yorimichi|1=Fujiwara no Yorimichi}} , was appointed {{ill|Kampaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kampaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199966}} . * {{ill|Karoku|en|Karoku|qid=Q1194421|lt=Karoku|1=Karoku}} 1 (Julian calendar {{ill|1226|en|1226|qid=Q5405|lt=1226|1=1226}} {{ill|January 20|en|January 20|qid=Q2267|lt=January 20|1=January 20}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} established the {{ill|Hjōtei-shū|ja|評定衆|1=Hyōjōshū|2=es|3=Hyōjōshū|4=ja|5=評定衆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hjōtei-shū|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōjōshū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11288036}} , a council for political and judicial decisions. * {{ill|Jianwu|en|Jianwu|qid=Q11065423|lt=Kenmu (Japan)|1=Jianwu}} 3 / {{ill|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1194159}} 1 (Julian calendar {{ill|1337|en|1337|qid=Q6039|lt=1337|1=1337}} {{ill|January 23|en|January 23|qid=Q2276|lt=January 23|1=January 23}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|qid=Q313942|lt=Emperor Go-Daigo|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}} escaped from his confinement at {{ill|Kazanin|ja|花山院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazanin|1=Kasan-no-in|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11615281}} and took refuge in {{ill|Yoshino|ja|吉野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshino|1=Yoshino|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q15410122}} and {{ill|Kinpusen-ji|ja|金峰山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinpusen-ji|1=Mount Kinpusen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10563986}} , marking the beginning of the {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|en|Nanboku-chō period|qid=Q264012|lt=Nanboku-chō period|1=Nanboku-chō period}} . * [[Ōei]]{{efn|July 1394 through April 1428|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 6 (Julian calendar {{ill|1400|en|1400|qid=Q6108|lt=1400|1=1400}} {{ill|January 17|en|January 17|qid=Q2264|lt=January 17|1=January 17}} ) - The {{ill|Ōei War|ja|Ōeiの乱|1=Ōei Rebellion|2=ja|3=応永の乱|4=zh|5=应永之乱|6=ko|7=오에이의 난|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei War|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10285774}} ended with the shogunate’s forces capturing {{ill|Sakai Castle|ja|堺城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Castle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , resulting in the death of {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshihiro|en|Ōuchi Yoshihiro|qid=Q4389583|lt=Ōuchi Yoshihiro|1=Ōuchi Yoshihiro}} . * {{ill|Kanshō|en|Kanshō|qid=Q1143928|lt=Kansei|1=Kanshō}} 1 (Julian calendar {{ill|1461|en|1461|qid=Q6532|lt=1461|1=1461}} {{ill|February 1|en|February 1|qid=Q2312|lt=February 1|1=February 1}} ) - Due to a severe {{ill|Famine|en|Famine|qid=Q168247|lt=Famine|1=Famine}} , the era name was changed from {{ill|Chōroku|en|Chōroku|qid=Q1193524|lt=Chōroku|1=Chōroku}} to Kansei. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}} {{ill|February 7|en|February 7|qid=Q2322|lt=February 7|1=February 7}} ) - The {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|en|Treaty of Shimoda|qid=Q497189|lt=Treaty of Shimoda|1=Treaty of Shimoda}} was signed, defining the border between Japan and Russia at {{ill|Iturup|en|Iturup|qid=Q215727|lt=Iturup Island|1=Iturup}} and {{ill|Urup Island|ja|ウルップ島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urup Island|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 得撫島|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 得撫島|1=Urup|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q847281}} , with {{ill|Sakhalin|en|Sakhalin|qid=Q7792|lt=Sakhalin|1=Sakhalin}} designated as a joint settlement area. == Births == * {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|qid=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō|1=Jōkyō}} 3 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1687|en|1687|qid=Q7668|lt=1687|1=1687}} {{ill|February 3|en|February 3|qid=Q2315|lt=February 3|1=February 3}} ) - {{ill|Nabeshima Muneshige|ja|鍋島宗茂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nabeshima Muneshige|1=Nabeshima Muneshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11650644}} , {{ill|Saga Domain|ja|Saga Domain|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} lord (+ {{ill|1755|en|1755|qid=Q7627|lt=1755|1=1755}} ). * {{ill|正德|en|正德|qid=Q11123425|lt=Shōtoku (Japan)|1=正德}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1712|en|1712|qid=Q6871|lt=1712|1=1712}} {{ill|January 28|en|January 28|qid=Q2285|lt=January 28|1=January 28}} ) - {{ill|Tokugawa Ieshige|en|Tokugawa Ieshige|qid=Q323443|lt=Tokugawa Ieshige|1=Tokugawa Ieshige}} , 9th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ {{ill|1761|en|1761|qid=Q7649|lt=1761|1=1761}} ). == Deaths == * [[Ōei]]{{efn|July 1394 through April 1428|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 6 (Julian calendar {{ill|1400|en|1400|qid=Q6108|lt=1400|1=1400}} {{ill|January 17|en|January 17|qid=Q2264|lt=January 17|1=January 17}} ) - {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshihiro|en|Ōuchi Yoshihiro|qid=Q4389583|lt=Ōuchi Yoshihiro|1=Ōuchi Yoshihiro}} , {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shugo Daimyō|1=shugo daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5368717}} (* {{ill|1356|en|1356|qid=Q6130|lt=1356|1=1356}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 3 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1851|en|1851|qid=Q7656|lt=1851|1=1851}} {{ill|January 22|en|January 22|qid=Q2275|lt=January 22|1=January 22}} ) - {{ill|Kunisada Chūji|en|Kunisada Chūji|qid=Q6444753|lt=Kunisada Chūji|1=Kunisada Chūji}} (Nagaoka Chūjirō), {{ill|Bakuto|en|Bakuto|qid=Q1929041|lt=Bakuto|1=Bakuto}} (* {{ill|1810|en|1810|qid=Q6922|lt=1810|1=1810}} ). == References == {{Reflist|qq=}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|20|12|22|11|21|1|12|1221|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
